stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Raised plinth houses are designed to keep living spaces above expected flood levels.
stages.explanation: Raised plinth houses are designed to keep living spaces above expected flood levels.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. The building footprint and plinth boundary are marked on site.
stages.explanation: Plinth dimensions and elevations are established before construction.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing soil.
stages.explanation: Excavation creates a stable base for the foundation system.

stages.title: PCC and Footings
stages.narration: Stage 4. PCC blinding and reinforced concrete footings are constructed.
stages.explanation: Footings safely transfer structural loads into the ground.

stages.title: Foundation Masonry
stages.narration: Stage 5. Foundation masonry is built to support the raised plinth and superstructure.
stages.explanation: The foundation system supports the raised plinth and superstructure.

stages.title: Engineered Earth Fill
stages.narration: Stage 6. Engineered earth fill is now being placed and compacted in layers. Proper compaction is essential to minimize future settlement and maintain the design flood elevation.
stages.explanation: The raised plinth is constructed using compacted engineered fill.

stages.title: Plinth Retaining Edge
stages.narration: Stage 7. The plinth retaining edge is constructed to stabilize the fill and resist erosion.
stages.explanation: The retaining edge prevents erosion and maintains plinth integrity.

stages.title: Plinth Beam
stages.narration: Stage 8. The reinforced plinth beam is cast to tie the structure and distribute loads.
stages.explanation: The plinth beam ties the structure together and distributes loads.

stages.title: Damp Proof Course
stages.narration: Stage 9. The damp proof course and waterproof membrane are installed above the plinth.
stages.explanation: The damp proof course prevents moisture from rising into walls.

stages.title: Masonry Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 10. Masonry walls rise course by course above the raised plinth.
stages.explanation: The masonry walls provide gravity load support and enclosure.

stages.title: Window and Door Installation
stages.narration: Stage 11. Door and window frames are installed above the design flood level.
stages.explanation: Openings are located above expected floodwater levels.

stages.title: Roof Construction
stages.narration: Stage 12. The lightweight roof frame and CGI sheeting are installed.
stages.explanation: The roof transfers loads into supporting walls.

stages.title: Drainage System
stages.narration: Stage 13. Surface drainage channels direct runoff away from the foundation and plinth.
stages.explanation: Proper drainage protects foundations and reduces saturation.

stages.title: Waterproofing System
stages.narration: Stage 14. External waterproofing and protective coatings are applied.
stages.explanation: Waterproofing improves durability and flood resilience.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. The elevated plinth prevents floodwaters from entering occupied spaces while drainage and waterproofing protect durability.
stages.explanation: Flood-resilient raised plinth house ready for occupancy.

footing.title: RCC Footing
footing.loadTransfer: Spreads column and wall loads to bearing soil.
footing.settlementControl: Sized for allowable bearing pressure and uniform settlement.

raised_plinth.title: Raised Plinth Fill
raised_plinth.floodProtection: Elevates floor level above design flood depth.
raised_plinth.compactionRequirements: Layered fill compacted to engineered density.

plinth_beam.title: RCC Plinth Beam
plinth_beam.structuralContinuity: Ties wall bases and distributes eccentric loads.
plinth_beam.loadDistribution: Redistributes wall loads to foundation masonry.

damp_proof_course.title: Damp Proof Course
damp_proof_course.moistureControl: Blocks capillary rise from plinth into walls.

drainage_channel.title: Drainage Channel
drainage_channel.waterDiversion: Collects and conveys surface runoff away from plinth.
drainage_channel.floodProtection: Limits saturation and erosion at plinth toe.
